name: Cinnamon Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to the temperature specified on the biscuit package.
2. Grease a 6-muffin tin.
3. Mix together the sugar and cinnamon in a bowl.
4. Coat each biscuit quarter with the sugar mixture, then divide equally among the muffin cups.
5. If desired, add nuts and raisins to each cup.
6. Melt the margarine until it is runny.
7. Drizzle the melted margarine over each "muffin."
8. Bake for 8-10 minutes or until golden brown.
9. Serve warm.
